script: execute as @e[distance=1..8] run effect give @s minecraft:slowness 5 3

entries.description: 周囲炎上+ダメージ+移動低下

script: execute as @e[distance=..15,type=#maf:enemymob,sort=random,limit=1] at @s run effect give @s minecraft:instant_health 1 4
